prestazioni: Engine: M157 DE46 AL (5.5L V8 Biturbo) – Full Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ package with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo H-beam rods, upgraded crankshaft), upgraded valve springs, titanium retainers, and ported cylinder heads for 850+ HP on E85 fuel. Paired with Weistec’s hybrid turbochargers (Garrett GTX4506R core with custom billet compressor wheels and 0.82 A/R turbine housings) and a custom 4.5-inch titanium exhaust system with Akrapović Ti-Evo mufflers and bypass valves.

Drivetrain: Upgraded SPEC Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel for the 7G-Tronic transmission, paired with a Quaife ATB differential and Weistec’s transmission cooler with integrated heat exchanger. Reinforced half-shafts and a custom driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop with 4340 chromoly steel.

Suspension & Handling: KW Suspensions Variant 5 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, and high-speed compression), custom-valved for the S63’s air suspension delete. Full H&R Monoball subframe bushings, polyurethane control arm bushings, and a custom sway bar setup from Hotchkis Sport Suspension. Brembo GT-R 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers with 420mm two-piece rotors (floating design) and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads, paired with stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Exterior: Full Rocket Bunny Pandem widebody kit (S-Class W222-specific) with carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser. Custom Vorsteiner V-FF 107 22-inch forged wheels (9.5x22 ET25 front, 12x22 ET45 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/30/22 front, 325/25/22 rear). Full PPF (XPEL Ultimate) and a custom matte Selenite Grey wrap with gloss black accents on the grille, mirrors, and badges.

Aero: Custom carbon fiber rear wing from 991 Design (adjustable angle, 3D-scanned for W222 chassis), paired with a front splitter from RW Carbon and a custom underbody diffuser with integrated LED lighting. Active aero delete (replaced with fixed carbon fiber elements) and a custom front lip from AGP Carbon.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Auto Trim Design, including dashboard, door cards, and headliner. Custom Recaro CS-GT bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, bolted to a custom roll cage from The Performance Company (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly). MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with quick-release hub, AIM MXS Strada dash display, and a custom center console with integrated iPad Pro running RaceLogic VBOX telemetry.
